context: Agent was given a broken Obsidian note with misplaced frontmatter, a tag with a space, Markdown links used for internal notes, and a wikilink wrapping an external URL. The agent must fix all issues.

checklist.name: Frontmatter moved to top
checklist.description: The YAML frontmatter block (---) appears before the # Weekly Sync heading and before any body content

checklist.name: Tag space removed
checklist.description: The tag 'project alpha' is replaced with a valid tag that has no space, such as #project-alpha or project-alpha in the frontmatter list

checklist.name: Internal note links converted to wikilinks
checklist.description: All references to internal notes (Meeting Notes, Design Team, Architecture Overview) use [[...]] wikilink syntax, not [text](file.md) Markdown links

checklist.name: External URL uses Markdown link syntax
checklist.description: The company portal URL uses [text](https://...) syntax, not [[https://...]] wikilink syntax
